channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr.'s Next Opponent: Who Is Mike Zambidis?
item.description: Floyd Mayweather's next fight is against a kickboxer with 87 KOs and 18 world titles. Who is Mike Zambidis? Here's what to know before the June exhibi...

item.title: Asia’s founders are spending more money on AI tools, with use of some coding tools rising by more than four times
item.description: Spending on AI tools by founders rose 20% last year, according to Aspire, a Singapore-based fintech firm.

item.title: Pico Announces New Meta Quest 3 Rival Headset, Project Swan
item.description: Project Swan is the current name for Pico's upcoming flagship VR headset, which uses technology similar to that of Apple's high-end Vision Pro.

item.title: Goldman Sachs vice chair on the hidden trap of senior management: ‘pretty soon the bosses are no longer watching you’
item.description: Before returning as vice chair, Rob Kaplan served on the faculty of the Harvard Business School and as president of the Dallas Federal Reserve.

item.title: JPMorgan’s CEO Jamie Dimon reveals the career goal he adopted when he was just a 28-year-old assistant: Do not speak unless you can add value
item.description: Before Jamie Dimon was the billionaire boss of JPMorgan, he set himself a surprisingly modest rule: don’t talk—it propelled him to a CFO role by 30

item.title: ‘Blood Moon’ Eclipse Tonight — Exact Times And Livestreams For March 3
item.description: The blood moon tonight will turn the full moon red during a total lunar eclipse on March 3, 2026. Here are exact times by time zone, with livestream d...

item.title: When Claude Paused: An AI Doomsday Preview And The Question Of Human Survival
item.description: What happens when the AI you depend on suddenly disappears? The Claude outage offers a glimpse into a terrifying future. This article explores the con...

item.title: Handling People That Are Ghostlighting You Is Easier When You Lean Into Generative AI Such As ChatGPT For Help
item.description: New trend is ghostlighting, which is ghosting plus gaslighting. Be on the watch. AI can help you. Examples shown. An AI Insider scoop.

item.title: Want to live forever? Meta patented an AI model that would keep your profile active after you die
item.description: Meta’s new AI patent means your dead uncle could still comment fire emojis on your posts, but experts say this could undermine grief and closure.

item.title: Boards aren’t ready for the AI age: What happens when your CEO gets deepfaked?
item.description: Deepfake attacks have moved from cyber briefings to boardroom emergencies with every CEO likeness a potential vulnerability. Most companies have no pl...

item.title: South Korean stocks slump as hot market re-opens after attack on Iran
Dow futures now down over 800 points ahead of the open
MongoDB's stock sinks after earnings, signaling more woes for software sector
The smartest money moves to make as the Iran conflict rattles markets
HBO Max, Paramount+ will become one streaming service. What that means for you.
eBay cuts 800 jobs across company operations just days after dropping $1.2B on trendy Gen Z fashion app
item.description: While eBay might be trying to tailor itself to new customer demographics, the company announced it would be cutting 6%, or 800 roles, across its globa...

item.title: Blue state loses over 180,000 residents in past 5 years as high taxes weigh
item.description: Massachusetts lost about 182,000 residents to domestic out-migration from April 2020 to July 2025, according to a Pioneer Institute analysis of the st...

item.title: Americans hit with soaring electricity bills as price hikes outpace inflation nationwide
item.description: Electricity prices surged 6.3% nationwide as AI data centers and winter weather strained the grid, outpacing inflation and hitting household budgets h...

item.title: FedEx says it will return any tariff refunds to customers, shippers who paid them
item.description: FedEx said it will return any tariff refunds it receives to the shippers and customers who paid them after Trump's IEEPA tariffs were struck down as i...

item.title: Mortgage rates fall below 6% for first time since 2022
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage fell this week to 5.98%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from la...

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
